name: Sublime Adjustable Dog Collar
description: **Remember to measure your pet for the paw-fect fit.** Your pup will be the bark of the town wearing the fetching Sublime Adjustable Dog Collar! It features a double-sided design with two complementary patterns for twice the possibilities, and twice the fun. It also includes an extra-wide width and stylish, durable plastic hardware. This collar is sure to keep your barking bestie looking fur-esh and fashionable all year long!
